Legends: Arceus Pokédex

Pokémon Legends: Arceus is a new style of Pokémon game. It's set in the distant past and the aim is to create Sinnoh's first Pokédex. All Sinnoh Pokémon are available in the game, plus an assortment of Pokémon from other generations including some Hisuian Forms.

Legends: Arceus main page
